titles.title: With All I Am (Into Your Hands)

authors.author: Reuben Morgan
Reuben Morgan
Mit aller Kraft (In deine Hand gebe ich mich hin)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Into your hand I commit again With All I am For you lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You hold my world In the palm of your hand And I'm yours forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus I believe in you Jesus I belong to you You're the reason that I live The reason that I sing With all I am

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'll walk with you Wherever you go Through tears and joy I'll trust in you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I will live In all of your ways and Your promises forever I will worship I will worship you forever
